privileged_info_summary: The task involves using FreeScout helpdesk software to reply to a customer maintenance request using a pre-configured Saved Reply template. The conversation is with Rachel Torres (rachel.torres@meridianav.com) regarding a 'Projector Maintenance Request - Conference Room B' in the 'AV Service Desk' mailbox. The required Saved Reply template is named 'Maintenance Appointment Confirmation' and contains the exact phrases: 'scheduled your equipment maintenance appointment', 'certified technician will arrive', and 'powered off and accessible'. All task data is synthetic, created via setup scripts that populate a local FreeScout test instance running on localhost:8080 with test credentials (admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!).
